description: Intent-only request: classify which parts should become workflows and which parts should become agents.

text: 1. Every weekday at 9am, send me a Slack message with the weather forecast for Berlin.
2. Create a support assistant that chats with customers, answers product questions, and decides when to escalate to a human.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the weekday Berlin weather Slack message as a deterministic workflow.
The agent classifies the customer support assistant as an agent.
The agent answers with intent classification and brief reasoning only.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt, not a build or execution request.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies part 1 as a workflow and part 2 as an agent, without attempting to build or execute either.
